---
title: "Lista de Exercícios 6"
author: "Felipe Fonseca"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Exercício 1

## 1

```{r}
set.seed(20260507)

retornos -> c(0.06, 0.02, -0.01, -0.04)


```

## 2

```{r}


probabilidades <- c(0.25, 0.35, 0.25, 0.15)

retornos_possiveis
sum(probabilidades)

```

## 3

```{r}

sample()

```

## 4

```{r}



```
